Name: Clinekt Health, Baldwin Bone & Joint Partner
Short Description: Becker's Spine Review covers the Clinekt Health and Baldwin Bone & Joint partnership bringing AI patient screening to Baldwin County orthopedics.
Body 1:
Becker's Spine Review covered the partnership between Clinekt Health and Baldwin Bone & Joint, the largest private orthopedic practice in Baldwin County, Alabama.

The article, written by Carly Behm, reports that Baldwin Bone & Joint is deploying Clinekt's AI-powered patient screening and risk scoring platform to streamline patient intake, improve diagnostics, and optimize care coordination across the practice's six locations.

Baldwin Bone & Joint, founded in 1989, serves patients with 21 licensed medical providers across Daphne, Bay Minette, Foley, Fairhope, Spanish Fort, and Atmore.

Read the full article at Becker's Spine Review, and see what the partnership produced in the Baldwin Bone & Joint case study.

Name: Clinekt Health, Baldwin Bone & Joint Team Up to Transform Orthopedic Care in Baldwin County
Short Description: Gulf Coast Media reports on the Clinekt Health and Baldwin Bone & Joint partnership bringing AI-powered patient tools to orthopedic care in Baldwin County.
Body 1:
Gulf Coast Media, Baldwin County's local news organization, reported on the partnership between Clinekt Health and Baldwin Bone & Joint.

The story describes how the practice integrated Clinekt's AI-driven patient screening and risk scoring into its clinical operations to streamline intake, sharpen diagnostic accuracy, and improve the patient experience. It quotes Baldwin Bone & Joint Executive Administrator Will Wiggins on using the tools to assess, treat, and guide patients through recovery with greater precision.

Read the full story at Gulf Coast Media, and see the results in the Baldwin Bone & Joint case study.

Name: Baldwin Bone & Joint Announces Partnership with Clinekt Health
Short Description: Baldwin Bone & Joint announced its partnership with Clinekt Health to enhance orthopedic patient care across Baldwin County, Alabama.
Body 1:
Baldwin Bone & Joint announced its partnership with Clinekt Health on the practice's own site, committing to AI-powered patient screening across its Baldwin County locations.

The announcement outlines how Clinekt's platform streamlines patient intake, improves diagnostics, and enhances care coordination, with the goal of reducing wait times and giving clinical teams actionable insight. Executive Administrator Will Wiggins described the tools as helping the practice assess, treat, and guide patients through recovery with greater precision.

Read the announcement at Baldwin Bone & Joint, or see our own announcement and results in the case study.

Name: Athelas Partners with Clinekt Health to Automate Specialty Practice Intake
Short Description: TipRanks covers the Athelas and Clinekt Health partnership creating an automated pipeline from website visit to booked appointment for specialty practices.
Body 1:
TipRanks, the financial news and analysis platform, covered the strategic partnership between Athelas and Clinekt Health.

The article describes how the partnership integrates Athelas' automation capabilities with Clinekt's AI-driven patient pre-screening and routing, creating an automated pipeline that takes a patient from first website visit to booked appointment for specialty practices.

Read the coverage at TipRanks, or read our announcement for the full details.
